payload.name: Setup Quality Assessment
payload.description: Ability to assess the quality of a potential trade setup and assign a confidence tier (A+, B, C). This determines position sizing.
payload.desired_state: Programmatic assessment using market data, chart structure, Heatseeker signals, VIX regime, and cross-ticker alignment. No human attestation required for data-available items.

TD-mn94og9j-ff83b2.description: Decompose and build: Setup Quality Assessment

payload.name: Chart Structure Detection
payload.description: Ability to identify key price patterns (double bottom/top, S&R levels, session levels) from historical candle data on multiple timeframes (hourly, 3-minute).
payload.desired_state: Historical candle storage (hourly + 3-min), swing point detection, double bottom/top pattern matching, S&R level identification with touch-count scoring.

TD-mn94og9w-9ca67e.description: Decompose and build: Chart Structure Detection

payload.name: Real-Time Market Data Feed
payload.description: Live price data for ES, MES, NQ, MNQ with sub-second latency. Required for stop order monitoring, bracket management, and real-time risk tracking.
payload.desired_state: Real market data feed (TopstepX API or third-party provider). Prices available via internal API for all trading services.

TD-mn94og9x-273b95.description: Decompose and build: Real-Time Market Data Feed

payload.name: Broker API Integration
payload.description: Ability to place, modify, and cancel orders through TopstepX API. Support for limit, market, stop, and bracket orders across multiple accounts.
payload.desired_state: Working TopstepX adapter with auth, order placement, position tracking, SignalR fill monitoring, and multi-account fan-out.

TD-mn94og9z-d6f14e.description: Decompose and build: Broker API Integration

payload.name: Economic Calendar Integration
payload.description: Awareness of upcoming high-impact economic events for news blackout enforcement.
payload.desired_state: Auto-populated economic calendar with dates/times for upcoming events. Risk management can query 'any events in next N minutes?' and get a real answer.

TD-mn94oga2-92a89a.description: Decompose and build: Economic Calendar Integration

payload.name: Trading Dashboard
payload.description: Real-time visual dashboard for human oversight. Shows open positions, P&L, active signals, risk status, and system health.
payload.desired_state: Web-based dashboard accessible from any device. Real-time updates. Kill-switch button. Position management controls.

payload.name: Backtesting Engine
payload.description: Ability to test trading strategies against historical data before deploying them live.
payload.desired_state: Feed historical candle + GEX/VEX data through the pipeline. Score strategy performance (win rate, avg R:R, max drawdown, consistency rule compliance).

payload.name: Heatseeker Data Ingestion
payload.description: Automated ingestion of GEX/VEX map data from Heatseeker source (currently manual screenshot review).
payload.desired_state: Automated or semi-automated ingestion. Could be screen capture + OCR, API if available, or structured data feed.

TD-mn94ogad-6266f0.description: Decompose and build: Heatseeker Data Ingestion

TD-mn96im40-58a80b.description: Assess current API key management practices and recommend improvements for the Supply Economy

result.assessment:
Work Package Analysis for Security Scan of API Key Management:

Concrete Deliverables:
1. Comprehensive API Key Management Assessment Report
2. Risk Severity Matrix
3. Recommended Security Improvement Roadmap

Specific Analysis Steps:
- Inventory current API key generation mechanisms
- Review existing key rotation and revocation processes
- Assess key storage and transmission security
- Evaluate access control and permission granularity
- Check encryption standards for key at rest and in transit

Requests to Other Services:
- Identity Service: Provide current API key generation logs
- Infrastructure Service: Share current key storage architecture details
- Audit Service: Retrieve historical key usage and access patterns

Proposed Deliverable Structure:

1. Assessment Report
- Current state analysis
- Identified vulnerabilities
- Compliance gaps
- Quantitative risk scoring

2. Risk Severity Matrix
- Low/Medium/High risk categorizations
- Potential impact assessments
- Exploit probability estimates

3. Improvement Roadmap
- Immediate mitigation recommendations
- Short-term (30-day) action items
- Long-term architectural improvements
- Estimated implementation complexity

Preliminary Recommendations (Draft):
- Implement dynamic key rotation (every 90 days)
- Add multi-factor authentication for key management
- Create granular, role-based key permissions
- Enhance key encryption at rest
- Develop comprehensive key lifecycle management

Constraints & Considerations:
- Must maintain system availability
- Minimize operational disruption
- Align with existing architectural patterns

Next Action: Request detailed current API key management documentation from Identity Service to begin deep analysis.
result.next_steps: Assessment complete. Awaiting human review or follow-up work packages.
